candidate_definition_hints.text: Maplibre GL Inspect adds an inspect control to maplibre-gl-js to view all features of the vector sources and allows hovering over features to see their properties.
Maplibre GL Inspect is a fork of Mapbox GL Inspect by lukasmartinelli ( https://github.com/lukasmartinelli/mapbox-gl-inspect ). It was forked to add support for maplibre-gl-js.
